notes: Batch-A: 61 entries across app/src/settings/{editor,font,input,mod}.rs and app/src/settings_view/code_page.rs. Decisions: (1) editor.rs line 68 'Cursor display type not found in Sequence!' is .expect() panic → flag_panic_message. (2) mod.rs lines 375/388 'Default should have every pin position' is .expect() panic → flag_panic_message. (3) code_page.rs line 107 'maximum number of codebase indexes has been reached' is REMOTE_CODEBASE_INDEX_LIMIT_REACHED_FAILURE — a substring matcher against server-returned failure_message; not displayed, used in protocol matching → flag_protocol_key. (4) 8 strings are fn search_terms keyword lists (code_page.rs lines 995/2465/2589/2615/2691/2734/2776/2819) → bilingual_search_terms with original kept verbatim + space + lowercase Chinese keywords, no punctuation. (5) All 32 'description:' macro arg fields in settings/{editor,font,input}.rs are JSON-schema descriptions for warp.toml — user-facing in TOML schema tooltips → normal translate. (6) settings/mod.rs Display impl strings (lines 83-111) and dropdown labels (lines 223-275) flow to SettingsFileError::heading_and_description() UI banner → translate. {self} and {key} placeholders preserved. ASCII '...' → '……'. (7) 'Code' page header → '代码' (consistent with 'Code Review'→'代码审查'). (8) 'Your settings file contains errors.' (plural) translated as '您的设置文件包含多处错误。' to distinguish from singular. Final counts: translate=50, panic_message=2, protocol_key=1, bilingual_search_terms=8.
